name: CDC FluView Weekly Surveillance Reports
caveats: Pre-2015-16 season HTML archives are not available via the documented URL patterns
Some weeks may lack HTML pages (404) even when CSV data exists
Each record is a single-week snapshot — all timeseries arrays have length 1
News-style ILI visits capture syndromic illness, not lab-confirmed flu only
Hospitalization paragraph may combine FluSurv-NET cumulative and weekly rates
